stemHtml: Due to a drive failure, the slats of a transport category aircraft do not retract properly after take-off. How will this impact the FMS in terms of ETA and fuel predictions?

options.a: ETA will be calculated accurately but fuel prediction will no longer be accurate.
options.b: ETA and fuel prediction will no longer be accurate.
options.c: ETA will no longer be accurate, and fuel prediction will be accurately calculated.
options.d: ETA or fuel prediction indications remain reliable.
